zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter於1361年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont21歲，母親Margaret de Vere26歲。他和Katherine de Everingham至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他於1393年登記服兵役。他去世於1396年9月9日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年35歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter于1361年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont21岁，母亲Margaret de Vere26岁。他和Katherine de Everingham至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他于1393年登记服兵役。他去世于1396年9月9日在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年35岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter was born in 1361, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, was 21 and his mother, Margaret de Vere, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Katherine de Everingham. He registered for military service in 1393. He died on 9 September 1396, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 35, and was buried in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter est né en 1361, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Vere, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Katherine d’Everingham. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1393. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1396, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter 1361 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont 21 und seine Mutter Margaret de Vere 26. Er hatte mit Katherine de Everingham mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1393 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. September 1396 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter è nato il nel 1361 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Vere, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Katherine de Everingham. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1393. Morì il 9 settembre 1396, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garterが1361年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumontは21歳，母Margaret de Vereは26歳であった。彼はKatherine de Everinghamとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1393年に兵役登録をした。彼は1396年9月9日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで35歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアセンプリンガム ウィス ポイントン アンド バーソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter(이)가 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Vere(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Katherine de Everingham(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1396년 9월 9일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter nasceu em 1361, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Vere, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Katherine de Everingham. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1393. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1396, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter родился в 1361 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Vere, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Katherine de Everingham. В 1393 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 сентября 1396 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter nació en 1361, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry de Beaumont, 3rd Baron Beaumont, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret de Vere, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Katherine de Everingham. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1393. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1396, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
